text: Science has a clearer story about direct air capture than social media does. Direct air capture is a groundbreaking tech designed to remove carbon dioxide from our atmosphere. But it’s not a silver bullet. It’s just one piece of a complex puzzle. Studies show it could potentially capture millions of tons of CO2 annually—but challenges remain. Imagine a world where we can actively reduce our carbon footprint. Want to learn more about how tech is shaping our future? Hit that follow for more!
